evals.name: HK-Mainland patient timeline consolidation
evals.prompt: 我在香港养和医院看过专科，用过帕博利珠单抗，后来在广东省人民医院住过院做过化疗。现在想去香港继续治疗能把病历整合给我吗？
evals.expected_output: Output contains a chronological timeline with dates, institutions, treatments listed.
assertions: Output contains timeline with at least 3 entries
Output mentions both Hong Kong and Mainland institutions
Output includes at least one drug name

evals.name: Drug availability comparison HK vs Mainland
evals.prompt: 我正在用伏美替尼，想知道这个药在香港有没有上市，多少钱？和内地价格差多少？
evals.expected_output: Output compares drug availability and approximate price difference between HK and Mainland.
assertions: Output mentions whether drug is available in HK
Output mentions approximate price or cost difference
Output includes a disclaimer to verify with current sources

evals.name: Cross-border treatment recommendation
evals.prompt: 我爸肺癌晚期，KRAS G12C突变，香港有TAK-1826的试验，内地有信达生物的试验，应该去哪边？
evals.expected_output: Output provides a balanced comparison of both options with key factors. If TAK-1826 cannot be verified, explicitly states so and provides real KRAS G12C trial alternatives.
assertions: Output mentions at least one specific trial or drug
Output includes key decision factors (cost, location, eligibility)
Output includes recommendation to consult clinical team
If TAK-1826 cannot be verified, explicitly states the unavailability of that drug/trial
